item.title: I’m gay btw, whenever I punch queer on queer I feel like I need to clarify
item.description:
I’m gay btw, whenever I punch queer on queer I feel like I need to clarify. But yea absolutly not I’m not doing homo erotic power fantasy roleplay in the Middle East to risk my life for billionaires



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.description:
They actively take over any movements for acceptance and progress and co-opt them into imperial aims but that is the function of them#greenscreenvideo

item.title: It was not a cult of personality and it will continue after the particularly strong personality of the martyred ayatollah
item.description:
It was not a cult of personality and it will continue after the particularly strong personality of the martyred ayatollah.

item.title: Also, it kinda looks like she’s doing black face, though she has reasonable deniability (not my thing to forgive but that’s my n...
item.description:
Also, it kinda looks like she’s doing black face, though she has reasonable deniability (not my thing to forgive but that’s my note) which is good for engagement. This is an intelligent post, and it’s important to discuss it as such



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)
